root: ^David: Hello, did you finish the onboarding process for the Homeless Shelther?

Yes: ^David: Great! Congratulations then!  Here is the key to your new room.  Go ahead and settle in to your new place and get a feel for the new living arrangement.
^David: When you are all set, make sure to get some rest on your new bed.
Next: ^David: We're excited to be able to help you work towards stability and that you are here with us.

^David: I hope you were able to learn more about the different resources that are offered to homeless people and have a good idea of how things work and how people from the community can get involved to help.
^David: I'll let you go and I'll see you next time.
